title: Tarot cards | etzutk
description: Resource pack for a tarot cards in Minecraft with the preservation of real fortune telling
body:
# **REQUARIED** **[RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)**

- All 78 tarot card
- **Paper --> any card**



By the way, I'm a YouTuber and I made this resource pack for this video.
